_comment: RBA incident rule, multi-tactic 'low and slow' (companion to rba_incident_cumulative_score). STAR scheduled PowerQuery rule over the risk index. Render once per risk-object type: RISK_OBJECT_TYPE='user' (TACTIC_THRESHOLD ~4) and ='host' (TACTIC_THRESHOLD ~3). Fires when an object touches >= TACTIC_THRESHOLD distinct MITRE tactics over 7d, catching extended campaigns that never spike the 24h score. Runs daily over a 7d lookback (runIntervalMinutes 1440, lookbackWindowMinutes 10080). Same rule conventions as the cumulative-score template (scheduled/2.0, entityMappings risk_object, treatAsThreat UNDEFINED, number() cast, deploy Disabled then enable).

data.name: {{PREFIX}} - RBA {{RISK_OBJECT_TYPE}} multi-tactic 7d
data.description: RBA incident rule (low and slow): {{RISK_OBJECT_TYPE}} objects with >= {{TACTIC_THRESHOLD}} distinct MITRE tactics in the risk index over 7d (dataSource.name='risk').

scheduledParams.query: dataSource.name='risk' risk_object_type='{{RISK_OBJECT_TYPE}}' risk_object=* | group tactics=estimate_distinct(mitre_tactic), risk_score_total=sum(number(risk_score)), techniques=estimate_distinct(mitre_technique), contributors=estimate_distinct(contributor), events=count(), first_seen=oldest(timestamp), last_seen=newest(timestamp), top_message=max_by(risk_message, number(risk_score)) by risk_object | filter tactics >= {{TACTIC_THRESHOLD}} | columns risk_object, tactics, risk_score_total, techniques, contributors, events, first_seen, last_seen, top_message | sort -tactics | limit 100
